name: ico
description: Infra Cost Optimizer — identify idle and underutilized cloud resources, orchestrate safe isolation and observation, and manage the approve-decommission workflow to reduce cloud spend.

interface.shortDescription: Identify idle cloud resources, orchestrate safe isolation, and reduce cloud spend.
interface.longDescription: Production-ready DevOps skill pack for SRE and platform engineering teams. Covers zombie/idle resource detection across 8 resource types (compute, database, cache, storage, network, K8s workload, K8s service, object storage), multi-dimensional scoring, deep technical scanning, isolation planning and execution, and safe decommission with audit trail.
defaultPrompt: Scan my cloud account for zombie resources
Find idle cloud resources wasting money
Which resources can I safely downsize?
